adminOverview.label: FOR ADMINISTRATORS
adminOverview.title: All School Management in One Place
adminOverview.description: Well-designed digital school processes are the foundation of an efficient school. OmniSchool centralizes everything your team needs — students, finance, timetables and communication — in a simple and powerful platform.

assistantOverview.label: FOR ASSISTANTS
assistantOverview.title: All Administration in One Place
assistantOverview.p1: OmniSchool is a true assistant for administrative teams. Manage all school processes from a centralized space — enrollment, finance, timetables and communication.
assistantOverview.p2: With student management, teacher management and planning modules, OmniSchool enables smoother workflows, saving time and resources.
assistantOverview.p3: OmniSchool also provides higher accuracy in data management, creating a reliable and unified information base for all administrative decisions.

solutionHero.title: Digital Processes for the Entire School
solutionHero.subtitle: A complete platform that supports students, parents, teachers and administration — at every stage of school life.

userRoles.title: Built for every user
userRoles.subtitle: OmniSchool adapts to every role in the school. Principal, assistant, teacher or parent — each user gets a space designed for their specific needs.

overviewSection.title: The complete solution to manage your private school
features: Complete finance — school fees, salaries, suppliers
Subjects, exams, grades and report cards
Campus services — transport, cafeteria, printing, stock
Teacher mobile app — attendance, homework, grades
Parent mobile app — full schooling follow-up

vision.title: Technology in the Service of Education
vision.p1: OmniSchool was born from a conviction: to give schools back time to focus on what matters most — students' success and growth.
vision.p2: Inspired by the best Scandinavian practices, the platform simplifies administration and strengthens collaboration between management, teachers and families.
vision.p3: By bringing together management, communication and planning in one place, OmniSchool helps schools operate with peace of mind — and puts learning back at the center of everyday life.

timeForTeaching.title: Save time for teaching
timeForTeaching.subtitle: Teachers spend too much time on administrative tasks. OmniSchool automates attendance, grades and communication so every minute counts in class.

hero.title: The Mobile App for Teachers
hero.description: OmniSchool – Teacher is a complete mobile app for teachers, providing holistic classroom management. It enables smart attendance tracking with pattern recognition and automatic alerts, syllabus planning and progress tracking in real time, and a detailed student directory with academic history. Teachers can publish homework with attachments and track submissions, organize their timetable with a smart synchronized calendar, and manage administrative requests (leave, certificates, recommendations). The app also includes fast grade entry with validation, a smart notification center for urgent communications and reminders, and a customizable professional profile with career history and certifications — all built with the Omni design system for a consistent and intuitive experience.

hero.title: Stay connected to your child's schooling
hero.description: In OmniSchool Parent, the parent's role is to monitor and supervise everything related to their child's education from a single app. They can view key information such as homework, timetable, grades, absences, school events and invoices. With simple navigation, they can quickly access modules and interact with the school by sending messages, booking appointments or making payments. The app sends real-time notifications to keep them informed about important updates, providing a clear and centralized view to support their child's school life.

who.title: The Digital Partner of Tunisian Schools
who.subtitle: Since our creation, we have been working with principals and teachers of Tunisian private schools to build the most complete and intuitive school management solution on the market.

aboutSection.title: About OmniSchool
aboutSection.p1: OmniSchool is a leading solution for school administration and communication for Tunisian private schools. Our platform enables smooth and efficient management of all administrative processes.
aboutSection.p2: We are deeply committed to our mission and continuously improve and develop our services so schools can focus on what matters most — educating our children.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: School management shouldn't be complicated. OmniSchool is designed to be intuitive and easy to use so teachers and administrators can focus on education rather than technology.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: A modern school relies on clear communication. OmniSchool creates a direct link between the school, teachers, parents and students.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Education must evolve with society. OmniSchool uses modern technologies and AI to automate tasks such as timetable creation and communication.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: School data is sensitive. OmniSchool is built with a strong focus on security, stability and reliability.

culture.title: Our culture
culture.p1: We believe OmniSchool is a unique and special place to work. This comes from the culture we cherish, our values, and our goal to contribute to better education in Tunisia.
culture.p2: We value responsibility, commitment and humility. For us, it's important to have a warm and inclusive company culture where every team member can thrive.

cta.title: Join the OmniSchool community
cta.subtitle: Dozens of Tunisian schools already trust us

success.title: Message sent!

0.q: How long does a demo take?
0.a: Our demos take about 30 minutes. We walk you through the platform and answer all your questions.

1.a: Yes, absolutely. The demo is completely free and with no commitment.

2.q: How long does it take to set up OmniSchool?
2.a: Setup usually takes 1 to 2 weeks depending on the size of the school. Our team supports you at every step.

3.q: Do you offer support in Arabic and French?
3.a: Yes. Our platform and support team are available in both Arabic and French.
